title: Create a Class Github Repository
author: Bonnie L Hurwitz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wv2fe8e
materials: Go to the class Github repository: https://github.com/hurwitzlab/biosys-analytics

steps.title: Fork (or "copy") the class repository...
steps.instruction: Fork (or "copy") the class repository into your own Github account. This creates a copy of the repository in your own account that you can edit and update. Select your Github account as the place to "fork" the repository. Forking (or copying the biosys-analytics repository). All homework assignments will be in this repository.

steps.title: Click on your "biosys-analytics" repository
steps.instruction: Click on your "biosys-analytics" repository. Click on the "Settings" tab on the top bar, click on the "Collaborators" tab on the side bar, and search for & add the instructors as collaborators. The instructors Github usernames are: bhurwitz33 and kyclark. Adding collaborators (the instructors) to YOUR Github repository called biosys-analytics

steps.title: Go to your Github account
steps.instruction: Go to your Github account. You will see a directory called biosys-analytics. This is your copy. http://github.com/my-username . (replace my-username with yours!)
